title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
